author: Anime News Network
text:

NOMELON NOLEMON performs opening song "Yurari Yureru," Aooo performs ending song "DAYS!"

text: Girls' Last Tour Manga Gets Prologue Manga Series on June 26 Tsukumizu to launch Kaisō Toshi Danpen-Shū short stories about Megacity before the end

text:

text:

text: Disney Twisted-Wonderland Anime Nominated for N. American TV Critics' Awards Live-action Drops of God, Last Samurai Standing series also nominated

text:

<cite>Alien Nine, Hotori: Simply Wishing For Hope</cite> anime; <cite>The Babe at My Back Has Her Eye on Me. I'm Done For., Let's Run an Inn on Dungeon Island! (In a World Ruled by Women)</cite> manga ship

author: Anime News Network
text:
Scholastic's Graphix to Release Yusuke Saitoh's Chuck and the Girl Manga in English
Single volume launches on August 3, 2027

author: Anime News Network
text:
Ize Press to Release Love So Pure BL Webtoon in English Print in December 2026
Series has garnered more than 4.6 million views, establishing itself a notable title among global BL readers

text:
